mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId , login_id AS loginId , password AS password , nickname AS nickname , name AS name , email AS email , phone AS phone , profile_image AS profileImage , created_at AS createdAt , role AS role , user_status AS userStatus FROM user01 WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND password = #{password} AND user_status = 100

SELECT user_id AS userId , login_id AS loginId , password AS password , nickname AS nickname , name AS name , email AS email , phone AS phone , profile_image AS profileImage , created_at AS createdAt , role AS role , user_status AS userStatus FROM user01 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user01 WHERE user_status = 100

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT user_id AS userId , login_id AS loginId , password AS password , nickname AS nickname , name AS name , email AS email , phone AS phone , profile_image AS profileImage , created_at AS createdAt , role AS role , user_status AS userStatus FROM user01 WHERE user_status = 100 ORDER BY user_id DESC ) a ) WHERE rn >= #{start} AND rn <= #{end}
SELECT login_id AS loginId , name AS name , email AS email FROM user01 WHERE name = #{name} AND email = #{email} AND user_status = 100
